tools.name: analysis.createUrlsExport
tools.description: Creates a new UrlExport object and starts a task that will export the results into a csv. Returns the model id that manages the task

tools.name: analysis.getAnalysisSummary
tools.description: Get an Analysis detail

tools.name: analysis.getCrawlStatistics
tools.description: Return global statistics for an analysis

tools.name: analysis.getCrawlStatisticsByFrequency
tools.description: Return crawl statistics grouped by time frequency (1 min, 5 mins or 60 min) for an analysis

tools.name: analysis.getCrawlStatisticsUrls
tools.description: Return a list of 1000 latest URLs crawled (all crawled URLs or only URLS with HTTP errors)

tools.name: analysis.getGanalyticsOrphanUrLs
tools.description: List of Orphan URLs. URLs which generated visits from the selected source according to Google Analytics data, but were not crawled with by the Botify crawler (either because no links to them were found on the website, or because the crawler was not allowed to follow these links according to the project settings).   For a search engine (medium: origanic; sources: all, aol, ask, baidu, bing, google, naver, yahoo, yandex) or a social network (medium: social; sources: all, facebook, google+, linkedin, pinterest, reddit, tumblr, twitter)

tools.name: analysis.getLinksPercentiles
tools.description: Get inlinks percentiles

tools.name: analysis.getLinksTopDomains
tools.description: Top domains

tools.name: analysis.getLinksTopSubdomains
tools.description: Top subddomains

tools.name: analysis.getPageRankLost
tools.description: Lost pagerank

tools.name: analysis.getSitemapsReport
tools.description: Get global information of the sitemaps found (sitemaps indexes, invalid sitemaps urls, etc.)

tools.name: analysis.getSitemapsSamplesOutOfConfig
tools.description: Sample list of URLs which were found in your sitemaps but outside of the crawl perimeter defined for the project, for instance domain/subdomain or protocol (HTTP/HTTPS) not allowed in the crawl settings.

tools.name: analysis.getSitemapsSamplesSitemapsOnly
tools.description: Sample list of URLs which were found in your sitemaps, within the project allowed scope (allowed domains/subdomains/protocols), but not found by the Botify crawler.

tools.name: analysis.getUrlDetail
tools.description: Gets the detail of an URL for an analysis

tools.name: analysis.getUrls
tools.description: Executes a query and returns a paginated response

tools.name: analysis.getUrlsAggs
tools.description: Query aggregator. It accepts multiple queries

tools.name: analysis.getUrlsDatamodel
tools.description: Gets an Analysis datamodel

tools.name: analysis.getUrlsExports
tools.description: A list of the CSV Exports requests and their current status

tools.name: analysis.getUrlsExportStatus
tools.description: Checks the status of an CSVUrlExportJob object. Returns json object with the status.

tools.name: analysis.getUrlsSuggestedFilters
tools.description: Return most frequent segments (= suggested patterns in the previous version) for a Botify Query.

tools.name: project.getProjectAnalyses
tools.description: List all analyses for a project

tools.name: project.getProjectUrlsAggs
tools.description: Project Query aggregator. It accepts multiple queries that will be executed on all completed analyses in the project

tools.name: project.getSavedFilter
tools.description: Retrieves a specific saved filter's name, ID and filter value

tools.name: project.getSavedFilters
tools.description: List all the project's saved filters (each filter's name, ID and filter value)

tools.name: project.testUrlRewritingRules
tools.description: Match and replace parts of a URL based on rules passed in POST data.

tools.name: user.getUserProjects
tools.description: List all active projects for the user

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
